mapper.select: select id, report_code, user_account, role_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from tb_report_user_role where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_report_user_role(report_code, user_account, role_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{reportCode}, #{userAccount}, #{roleType}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into tb_report_user_role(report_code, user_account, role_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{entity.reportCode}, #{entity.userAccount}, #{entity.roleType}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_report_user_role(report_code, user_account, role_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{entity.reportCode}, #{entity.userAccount}, #{entity.roleType}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update report_code = values(report_code), user_account = values(user_account), role_type = values(role_type), create_by = values(create_by), create_time = values(create_time), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_report_user_role
report_code = #{reportCode},
user_account = #{userAccount},
role_type = #{roleType},
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
